articles.description: The Army on April 1 claimed to have killed a terrorist in Ganderbal’s Arhama forest area during a cordon and search operation

articles.title: Aman Gupta shares cryptic post on ‘new partner’, leaves internet guessing
articles.description: Aman Gupta has sparked curiosity with a cryptic post hinting at a ‘new partner’ ahead of his anniversary. The vague message has triggered widespread speculation online, with followers debating whether it signals a personal or professional shift.

articles.title: Nine policemen sentenced to death in India over Covid custody killings
articles.description: The father and son died in jail after being arrested on suspicion of breaching Covid lockdown rules in 2020.

topStories.title: Trump's deadline nears - with little indication Iran is on board
topStories.description: The US president is in a delicate political position as the final hours to Tuesday's deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz tick down.

topStories.title: Trump threatens to take out Iran in 'one night' if no deal before deadline
topStories.description: The US president wants Tehran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global energy route, before his Tuesday deadline.

topStories.title: Trump signals ‘active negotiation partner’ in Iran talks, hints at progress in negotiations
topStories.description: “I can't talk about ceasefire. But I can tell you that we have an active, willing participant on the other side. They would like to be able to make a deal. I can't say any more than that,” Trump told reporters.

topStories.title: Assam election verdict hinges on parties reading the tea leaves right
topStories.description: Influential in at least 35 of the 126 seats in Assam, the ‘tea tribes’ have gravitated towards the BJP since 2014; the Congress is counting on the State government’s ‘failure’ to increase wages and provide ST reservation to the community

topStories.title: Three educationists rapped by Supreme Court over NCERT chapter seek hearing
topStories.description: Government informs the court about the constitution of an expert committee comprising former apex court judge Justice (retired) Indu Malhotra, senior advocate KK Venugopal and Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University vice chancellor Prakash Singh, to finalise the NCERT curriculum on Legal Studies for Class 8 and other grades.

topStories.title: Supreme Court directs CBI to probe ‘contracts awarded’ to Arunachal Pradesh CM Pema Khandu’s family
topStories.description: Petitioners alleged that there was rampant corruption, nepotism and dispensing with a transparent and open tender system in the award of contracts for 10 years between January 2015 till December 31, 2025

topStories.title: US ramps up threats if Iran doesn’t meet deadline — ‘Every bridge will be decimated by 12 o’clock tomorrow night’
topStories.description: “We have a plan, because of the power of our military, where every bridge in Iran will be decimated by 12 o’clock tomorrow night,” Trump said, describing the scale of potential US strikes.

topStories.title: Trump says someone leaked information as US forces looked for downed pilot, warns jail time for leaker
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump on Monday (local time) warned jail time for the leaker who shared critical information as the US forces launched an operation to rescue two F-15E jet pilots after it crashed in Iran on 3 April.

topStories.description: Steve Hilton, who advised the former prime minster and hosted a Fox News show, is running as a Republican.

topStories.description: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.

dailyNews.description: The process to remove a sitting CEC is similar to that of the removal of a judge of the Supreme Court or a high court. Individuals in these positions can only be removed from on the ground of 'proven misbehaviour or incapacity'.

dailyNews.title: ‘Blew up the whole place’: Donald Trump reveals inside details of the daring mission to rescue captured F-15 pilots
dailyNews.description: Trump told reporters at a White House press briefing that 170 aircraft were used in the operation to recover the first crew member and another 155 in the second rescue mission.

dailyNews.title: Trump Hormuz Deadline LIVE Updates: Trump defends strikes, claims they aid Iranians: ‘They want to hear bombs because…’
dailyNews.description: LIVE: Trump stated that military action is ultimately benefiting Iranians, saying they 'want to hear bombs because they want to be free'. He added that Iranians are not taking to the streets in protest because 'they will be shot immediately' by the regime, contrasting that with ongoing strikes.

dailyNews.title: ‘Take the oil because it’s there for the taking’, says Trump as he suggests use of military power to obtain Iran's oil
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Monday (local time) said that if it were up to him, he would have preferred using military power to take control of Iran's vast oil reserves, AP reported

dailyNews.title: After ICE detention, 5‑year‑old Liam Conejo Ramos suffers trauma and sees a psychologist, parents say
dailyNews.description: Liam Conejo Ramos, the five-year-old boy who was detained by the US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) in January this year, reportedly fears being detained again. Sharing how their son has changed, his parents, in an interview, said that he is now seeing a psychologist regularly.

dailyNews.description: Donald Trump live address: Trump said the US has an “active, willing participant on the other side” in negotiations. On a potential ceasefire, he added: “I can't talk about ceasefire… They would like to be able to make a deal. I can't say any more than that.”

dailyNews.title: Who is Steve Hilton? Trump-endorsed Republican aiming to replace Gavin Newsom in 2026 governor election
dailyNews.description: Steve Hilton’s career spans British politics, Silicon Valley innovation, and American media. With a blend of policy experience, media visibility, and now a high-profile endorsement from Donald Trump, he has emerged as a key Republican figure in California’s 2026 gubernatorial race.

dailyNews.title: Trump aiming to 'subvert the midterms' and 'sow doubt' about results, ABC's Stephanopolous reports
dailyNews.description: ABC anchor George Stephanopoulos claimed President Donald Trump is trying to sow doubt about the 2026 midterms with his executive order on mail-in ballots.

dailyNews.title: Trump roasts Biden over autopen use in viral interaction with kids at White House Easter Egg Roll
dailyNews.description: President Trump turned the annual White House Easter Egg Roll into a comedy session, joking about selling his autographs and taking shots at President Biden's autopen use.

dailyNews.title: White House fires back at 'SNL' after Michael Che cracks Trump assassination joke during 'Weekend Update'
dailyNews.description: The White House knocked NBC's "Saturday Night Live" after "Weekend Update" anchor Michael Che made an assassination joke about President Donald Trump.

dailyNews.title: Iran’s nuclear gamble leaves America one choice — and it can't be a deal
dailyNews.description: The White House signals a new Iran strategy targeting the IRGC and clerical apparatus amid reports of a near-complete nuclear weapons breakout.

dailyNews.title: Trump claims he’d win as the president of  Venezuela — just needs to 'quickly' learn Spanish
dailyNews.description: President Trump joked he might run for president of Venezuela, claiming he polls higher than any other politician in the South American country.
